channel.title: The ParrotTalk Blog
channel.description: A founder's journal about building ParrotTalk, a 100% free IELTS practice site with AI feedback.

item.title: The honesty pass: cutting every claim I could not stand behind
item.author: contact@parrottalk.app (Xavier, founder of ParrotTalk)
item.description: Early on I went through every page of ParrotTalk and removed anything that was not strictly true. The day it stopped being a demo.

item.title: Ten bugs, and letting you submit one section at a time
item.author: contact@parrottalk.app (Xavier, founder of ParrotTalk)
item.description: An unglamorous bug-fix day, and the feature hiding inside the bug list: practice one IELTS section at a time.

item.title: Teaching a parrot to grade a voice in one day
item.author: contact@parrottalk.app (Xavier, founder of ParrotTalk)
item.description: Day one of ParrotTalk: building browser voice recording and AI Speaking feedback in a single day.

item.title: How our AI scoring works, and how accurate it is
item.author: contact@parrottalk.app (Xavier, founder of ParrotTalk)
item.description: How ParrotTalk estimates your IELTS band with AI, what we calibrated to make it fair, and the limits we are honest about.

item.title: I couldn't find an IELTS site I liked, so I built one by talking to an AI
item.author: contact@parrottalk.app (Xavier, founder of ParrotTalk)
item.description: The honest story of building ParrotTalk, a 100% free IELTS practice site with AI feedback. From a one-day prototype to a real platform, one fix at a time.
